name: Synup
heading: Synup Product Overview
highlight_text: Who it is best for: Agencies, Resellers, Enterprise, Small-mid Businesses
product_overview_description:
Synup Product Overview

Synup is a local marketing platform built for agencies and multi-location brands. It helps put your local business on the map and create a stellar reputation for your brand. The tool extends to a reseller-centric solution hub, which also helps agencies find new leads and manage their clients and operations easily.

Core Features

🏆Create and sync your listings across Google, Facebook, and 60+ other niche directories.

🏆Bulk edit your business listings for multiple locations and automate any updates in a few clicks.

🏆Optimize your listings for voice search assistants like Alexa, Cortana, Siri, and more.

🏆Collaborate with your team better with location-level performance analysis and user access flows.

🏆Monitor and bulk respond to your reviews with the help of AI and pre-built templates

🏆Integrate your CRM or POS system with Synup to auto-request reviews from customers via SMS, email, or custom landing pages.

🏆Some of the best local keyword tracking and grid ranking technologies to give you deep insights into your local performance.

🏆Managed services to take up some of your workload and help keep your listings updated on niche directories.

🏆Complete Whitelabel software for agencies and resellers who want to manage business local marketing and listings for their clients.

What’s great

✅Expand your digital footprint across multiple platforms, making it easier for potential customers to find you.

✅Boost your chances of appearing in relevant local searches, including voice-activated queries.

✅Enable better coordination and decision-making among team members managing your online presence.

✅Maintain a positive brand image by efficiently handling customer reviews and feedback.

✅Gain insights to refine your local marketing approach and outperform competitors.

✅Offload time-consuming tasks, allowing you to concentrate on core business activities

✅Grow your service offerings or manage multiple clients without proportionally increasing effort.

What’s not great

❌Customer support seems to be a major pain point, especially for small-mid sized businesses that struggle to get flexible plans and get tangled in support tickets

❌Platform is very expensive, especially if you’re trying to add their reputation management feature, you’ll end up paying thousands of dollars a year and get stuck in annualized contracts

❌Lacks continuous innovation. The platform very outdated for its core features and the massive scale of operations mean there’s little to no innovation to add value for customers.

Pricing

If you have fewer than 10 locations, Synup costs about $34.99 per month at the standard plan which is perfect to get a headstart with your local marketing efforts. The tool also offers a free trial of 14 days for a limited set of directories. Agencies and resellers can contact for a bulk price to optimize their margins.

How to get started with Synup

Sign up for a demo and we’ll get your account set up entirely. We let you connect your Google and Facebook business accounts in a few clicks. After that, you can sync your business info to all opted directories. To view and edit your business info, simply go to ‘Listings’ > ’Listings Overview’.

‍
